title: Fermented Silky Energizing Indian Rice Stir-fry
description: A silky and energizing dish infused with rum, featuring a blend of aromatic spices and nut-free-friendly ingredients for an easy-to-make breakfast option.
instructions: Boil water in a pot and add rice, allowing it to soak for at least an hour.
Heat oil in a pan and sauté onions, ginger, garlic, cumin seeds, and fennel seeds until fragrant.
Add tomatoes, season with salt, pepper, and tamarind paste. Cook until the tomatoes soften.
Drain rice and add to the tomato mixture along with Rice Vinegar, stir well to combine.
In a separate pan, heat oil and sauté chicken if using for 5 minutes or until cooked through. Add to the rice and tomato mixture, mix well.
Serve hot over rice or as a side dish with eggs.
Optional: For a touch of sweetness and tang, add rum before serving.
